title: Blockchain Consensus Mechanism Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process nodes follow to achieve agreement on the state of the blockchain, validating and adding a new block of transactions.
relationships: A new transaction is broadcast to the network
Nodes validate the transaction against protocol rules
A validator is selected to propose a new block
The network participates in a consensus algorithm to agree on the block's validity
Nodes verify the proposed block and the consensus proof
The validated block is added to the chain, updating the ledger
